scene_title: Cordeiro vs Robo face a face
narrative_beat: Divino em branco e ouro contra artificial em carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Lamb of God with seven horns and seven eyes in pure white and gold in sovereign pose face to face with crimson metal humanoid robot in direct divine versus artificial contrast in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the Lamb of God and the humanoid robot face to face — divine versus artificial
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated empty plaza at dusk with long grey shadows in background
props: Lamb of God in pure white and gold

composition.foreground: Lamb and robot in vivid white gold vs crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, white-gold vs crimson grading

mood.emotion: the original author facing his counterfeit

symbolism.primary: the Lamb who sealed the seals confronting the image he prophesied
symbolism.secondary: empty plaza as the space where history must choose sides

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
